## ⚠️ CRITICAL: Course Fit Layer Failure

**All 72 players had `course_tier=NO_HISTORY` despite Memorial being an annual event at Muirfield Village since 1976.** The Phase 1 Apollo course history lookup returned 0 historical rounds for every player. This is a significant data pipeline failure that needs investigation.

**Impact:** The course fit layer (weight 0.22 pool, 0.17 DFS) contributed zero differentiation. For a course with 9+ years of SG history, this layer typically improves Spearman by ~0.02-0.04. We likely left points on the table.

**Action required:** Investigate why event_id=23 course history returned empty. Check Apollo/Phase 1 logs for the week of June 2. Possible causes: API rate limiting, incorrect event_id in history query, or stale cache from `_dg_cache`.

---

## Strokes Gained Analysis

The dominant story at Muirfield this week: **approach play + putting combined were decisive.**

| Factor | Correlation with Finish |
|--------|------------------------|
| sg_app | **0.726** |
| sg_putt | 0.556 |
| sg_arg | 0.475 |
| sg_ott | 0.189 |

Winner J.T. Poston: sg_app=+8.08, sg_putt=+6.86 (elite in both)
Runner-up Gerard: sg_putt=+10.55 (tournament's dominant putter)
3rd Clark: sg_app=+8.96 (approach specialist)

**OTT was nearly irrelevant** (0.189). The model's 0.95x OTT weight was directionally correct but BBI's higher baseline for big hitters didn't hurt significantly because approach and putting performance overwhelmed distance.

---

## Calibration Results

| Market | Brier | Skill% |
|--------|-------|--------|
| top_20 | 0.184 | +10.9% |
| top_10 | 0.137 | -5.7% |
| top_5 | 0.070 | -7.8% |
| win | 0.015 | -5.6% |

Negative skill for top_10, top_5, and win: BBI was overconfident on its top-ranked players delivering at Memorial (Scheffler/McIlroy/Aberg/Young). The winner at BBI #51 drives this outcome — no model would have predicted it confidently.

Top_20 shows positive skill (+10.9%), meaning BBI correctly spreads probability to the broader contention window.

---

## Factor Attribution (Actual Top-10 vs Full Field)

| Factor | Ratio | Direction |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| dfsValue | 1.232 | ↑ over-indexed |
| form | 1.176 | ↑ over-indexed |
| talent | 1.099 | ↑ over-indexed |
| floor | 1.097 | ↑ over-indexed |
| cutSafety | 1.096 | ↑ over-indexed |
| leverage | 1.023 | → neutral |
| contrarian | 1.011 | → neutral |
| ceiling | 0.895 | ↓ under-indexed |
| courseFit | N/A | (0 for all players) |

**courseFit contributed nothing** (all NO_HISTORY). This is the single largest model gap this week.

**Ceiling underperformed** (ratio 0.895) — the high-upside players (Scheffler, McIlroy ceiling scores) didn't deliver top-5 results.

**Form overperformed** (ratio 1.176) — players in good recent form did finish well; the form layer added genuine predictive value.

---

## Improvement Suggestions

1. **[URGENT] Fix Apollo course history lookup for Memorial Tournament (event_id=23):** Annual event at Muirfield Village since 1976 should have 8+ years of quality course history. Something broke in Phase 1. Check `_dg_cache`, event_id lookup logic, and whether the `historical-raw-data/rounds` call is using the correct year range. Expected fix: course fit coverage >60% (45+ of 72 players).

2. **[Medium] Muirfield Village DNA calibration:** sg_app weight of 1.20 was directionally correct (APP correlation 0.726). Consider raising to 1.25 once course history is restored. sg_putt weight of 1.15 may be slightly low — Gerard's win-level putting (+10.55 over 4 rounds) would benefit from higher putts weight at 12+ stimp bentgrass courses.

3. **[Low] OTT dampening at precision courses:** OTT correlation 0.189 is the lowest of the season. For bentgrass courses with tight tee shots and premium on iron accuracy, consider a `precision_course_flag` that reduces OTT weight to 0.85x (currently 0.95x for Memorial).
